description:
Since Asriel was busy, she was gonna pester you instead!!! Or maybe just hotbox your shitty room or something

I'M WORKING SUMMERS DOWN THE STREET
OFF THE HIGHWAY
I FEEL MY CLOTHES BURNING HOLES INTO MY HEAD

THIS IS ME, IT'S HOW I ACT NOW!!!

This ver of dess was inspired by some comics made by bakedbananners1!!! Cool stuff.

P.S You replace kris in ts scenario!!! Anypov still probs works though
